---
title: "Examples"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.container}
# Examples

This page is a practical launch pad for common DPmixGPD tasks. Use it to pick a workflow path, then open the full walk-through pages.

[Start workflow series](../start/start-here.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Workflow roadmap](../roadmap.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}
[Open pkgdown articles](/pkgdown/articles/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

::: {.grid-3}

::: {.cardx}
### First model in minutes
- Start at [Start overview](../start/index.html)
- Then run [Model specification article](/pkgdown/articles/model-spec.html)
- Then follow [Start: Start Here](../start/start-here.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Unconditional modeling
- Bulk only: [Unconditional article](/pkgdown/articles/unconditional.html)
- Bulk + tail details: [Model specification article](/pkgdown/articles/model-spec.html)
- Example sequence: [ex01-ex04](ex01-unconditional-dpm-crp.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Conditional modeling
- Covariate-driven density modeling: [Conditional article](/pkgdown/articles/conditional.html)
- Model setup details: [Model specification](/pkgdown/articles/model-spec.html)
- Example sequence: [ex05-ex08](ex05-conditional-dpm-crp.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Causal modeling
- End-to-end causal workflow: [Causal article](/pkgdown/articles/causal.html)
- Model and posterior details: [Model specification](/pkgdown/articles/model-spec.html)
- Example sequence: [ex09-ex14](ex09-causal-no-x-crp.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Backend decisions
- Compare CRP vs stick-breaking: [Model specification](/pkgdown/articles/model-spec.html)
- Structured choice support: [Decision Guide](../decision-guide.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Diagnostics and checks
- MCMC process and diagnostics: [Model specification](/pkgdown/articles/model-spec.html)
- Frequently asked issues: [FAQ](../faq.html)
:::

:::

:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

## Workflow Segments

Use these segment hubs to stay in-sequence without guessing where to go next.

::: {.grid-2}

::: {.cardx}
### Start + Troubleshooting
[Start Basic sequence](../start/start-here.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Jump to troubleshooting](../start/troubleshooting.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}

1. [Start Here](../start/start-here.html)
2. [Introduction](../start/introduction.html)
3. [Basic model compile and run](../start/basic-model-compile-run.html)
4. [Backends and workflow](../start/backends-and-workflow.html)
5. [Troubleshooting](../start/troubleshooting.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Unconditional examples (ex01-ex04)
[Start Unconditional sequence](ex01-unconditional-dpm-crp.html){.btn .btn-primary}

1. [ex01 Unconditional DPM CRP](ex01-unconditional-dpm-crp.html)
2. [ex02 Unconditional DPM SB](ex02-unconditional-dpm-sb.html)
3. [ex03 Unconditional DPMGPD CRP](ex03-unconditional-dpmgpd-crp.html)
4. [ex04 Unconditional DPMGPD SB](ex04-unconditional-dpmgpd-sb.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Conditional examples (ex05-ex08)
[Start Conditional sequence](ex05-conditional-dpm-crp.html){.btn .btn-primary}

1. [ex05 Conditional DPM CRP](ex05-conditional-dpm-crp.html)
2. [ex06 Conditional DPM SB](ex06-conditional-dpm-sb.html)
3. [ex07 Conditional DPMGPD CRP](ex07-conditional-dpmgpd-crp.html)
4. [ex08 Conditional DPMGPD SB](ex08-conditional-dpmgpd-sb.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Causal examples (ex09-ex14)
[Start Causal sequence](ex09-causal-no-x-crp.html){.btn .btn-primary}

1. [ex09 Causal no X CRP](ex09-causal-no-x-crp.html)
2. [ex10 Causal X no propensity score SB](ex10-causal-x-no-ps-sb.html)
3. [ex11 Causal same backend CRP](ex11-causal-same-backend-crp.html)
4. [ex12 Causal same backend SB](ex12-causal-same-backend-sb.html)
5. [ex13 Causal different backends CRP](ex13-causal-different-backends-crp.html)
6. [ex14 Causal different backends SB](ex14-causal-different-backends-sb.html)
:::

:::

:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

## Where to go next

1. Use [Kernels](../kernels.html) if you are uncertain about distribution family selection.
2. Use [Reference](../reference.html) to jump directly to function docs.
3. Use [Workflow troubleshooting](../start/troubleshooting.html) if you are blocked.

:::
:::
